title: Pandiya Naadu
desc: Sivakumar, a young man, lives in a close-knitted family. When a criminal kills his brother, he and his father decide to take revenge but in their own separate ways.

title: Sivakasi
desc: Muthappa is forced to leave his house at a young age for a crime that his older brother, Udayappa, has committed. When he returns home, he learns about his brother's antics and decides to punish him.

title: Aadikeshava
desc: Following the death of his biological father, a man travels to Rayalaseema to protect his sister and his ancestral temple.

title: Sardar
desc: Son of a disgraced spy, Inspector Vijay Prakash must race against the clock to stop a mysterious water company from producing and spreading toxic water across the nation.

title: Saamy 2
desc: Ramasamy, who works as a front-end receptionist for Union Minister Viswanathan, decides to pursue civil service. Soon, Viswanathan's daughter falls in love with him after he saves her from gangsters.
